name: Cocktail Meatballs/ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine all meatball ingredients in a bowl and shape into 1-inch meatballs.
3. Cook the meatballs in a hot, 12-inch skillet over medium heat for about 15 minutes, turning occasionally, until browned. Remove from skillet and let drain.
4. In the same skillet, heat chili sauce and grape jelly until the jelly is melted. Add meatballs and stir to coat.
5. Simmer uncovered for about 30 minutes.
6. Serve hot. Makes about 5 dozen appetizers.
